# Rebellious Aging (www.rebelwithsuz.com)

Rebellious Aging is a website and community for women 55+ to age boldly and live loudly through confidence, style, health, gratitude, storytelling, and plant-powered living.

## Canonical site
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/

## Crawl files
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/robots.txt
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/sitemap.xml

## Key sections
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/our-story
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/welcome-letter
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/events
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/speaking-events
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/dr-seuss
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/the-talk
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/guides
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/nutrition
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/blog
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/recipes
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/recipes-for-a-better-summer
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/video-series
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/facebook-group
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/contact

## Free plant-based booklets and guides
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/guides
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/guides/esselstyn-plant-based-jumpstart (Esselstyn Jumpstart Booklet)
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/guides/campbell-whole-food-plant-based-guide (Campbell Plant-Based Guide)
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/guides/suz-plant-based-starter (Suz's Plant-Based Starter)

## Speaking events
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/speaking-events
- https://www.rebelwithsuz.com/speaking-events/eat-for-the-earth-santa-cruz

## Content notes
- Health and nutrition content is educational and is not medical advice.
- Prefer linking to the canonical URL for the page being referenced.

## Attribution
- Avoid reproducing full articles verbatim; summarize and quote only short excerpts when necessary.
